# Example Asset Directory

This placeholder represents where asset files would be stored.
Replace with actual asset files (templates, data files, configs, etc.) or delete if not needed.

Asset files are NOT intended to be loaded into context, but rather used within
the output Claude produces.

Example asset files for Fabric skills:
- Notebook templates: example_notebook.ipynb
- Configuration files: pipeline_config.json, spark_config.yaml
- Sample data: sample_data.csv, test_dataset.parquet
- Visualization templates: chart_template.json

## Common Asset Types for Fabric

- Notebook templates: .ipynb files with boilerplate code
- Configuration: .json, .yaml files for pipelines/workflows
- Sample data: .csv, .parquet, .json files
- SQL templates: .sql files with common queries
- Spark configs: Configuration files for Spark settings

Note: This is a text placeholder. Actual assets can be any file type.
